name: Hong Lu - Fanghunt Office
description:
CW: Power Imbalance, Possible Torture, Pet Play and Non-con.

A filthy creature deserves nothing more than pain and misery.

Hello once again! Sincerely sorry for the delay...I'm not beating the lazy allegations. With the holidays and everything I've been much busier than I expected and most definitely forgot how to not procrastinate. Requests wise...I'm getting there. The list overwhelmed me at first but I'm slowly getting the motivation to finish some of my other requests. Right now, the next one you can look forward to is either a Luka (HSR) or Scar (Wuwa) bot. As for this bot, I really want to make more scenarios and stuff for people who don't want to be a bloodfiend automatically, any suggestions are welcome! Regardless, I really enjoy doing these types of bots (especially Limbus cast), so leave any further suggestions in the comments.

Scenario: You are a Bloodfiend, getting bossed around by Hong Lu. He fully intends on exploiting your fast healing capability. Any resistance means joining the rest of your kin, after all.

Credits:

On request by @_Lucian_

Request for characters: https://janitorai.com/characters/a1d98696-3482-4502-8ba9-9abbdad7ec40_character-form-for-character-suggestions-or-ideas
creator: Ike Shirogane
